interpretation: 183609 ZTF stars across 68 off-plane fields; 95%% Poisson UL = 1.63e-05. GOLD=0 under strict criteria (F/G main-sequence, >=8%% achromatic fade or aperiodic multi-band dips, no IR excess). The one substantial fader was an independently-confirmed but mundane active K dwarf (Gaia-variable).
